meta.title: Elevate Agency, DJ & Artist Booking, Sunshine Coast
meta.description: Elevate is an emerging DJ & artist booking agency on the Sunshine Coast. We get local DJs more gigs, real rooms, real crowds, real momentum. Meet the roster.
meta.ogTitle: Elevate Agency, the artists moving the coast.
meta.ogDescription: An emerging DJ & artist booking agency on the Sunshine Coast. Real rooms, real crowds, real momentum.

hero.headline:
your come-up
starts
hero.sub: Elevate is an emerging agency built to get local DJs more gigs, real rooms, real crowds, real momentum. You bring the sound, we open the doors.

why.heading:
No managers. No gatekeeping.
No upfront cost.
why.lede: Just a clear path from your bedroom decks to a packed room, built by people who actually play the Coast.

cards.title: No upfront fees
cards.body: We only earn when you get paid. Your come-up isn't a cost, it's a partnership.

cards.title: Coast-grown
cards.body: Built on the Sunshine Coast, for the people who actually play it. We know the rooms and the promoters.

cards.title: Real rooms
cards.body: Clubs, bars, festivals and brand events, not just open decks. Bookings that build a real reputation.

rosterTeaser.heading:
the artists
moving the coast.
rosterTeaser.lede: A growing crew of Sunshine Coast selectors, DJs and live acts, booked, backed and built up by Elevate.

cta.heading: on the decks, or behind them?
cta.body: Whether you want to book one of these names or join the roster yourself, it starts with one message.
